name: give-ai-a-spine
description: A reality-check skill that reduces automatic agreement and turns important decisions into evidence-backed action.

interface.longDescription: Pressure-test important plans, separate evidence from story, surface counterevidence, and leave with one observable next action.
defaultPrompt: Reality-check this plan before I commit to it.
Separate the facts from my assumptions and find the weakest one.
Challenge my reasoning, then give me one observable next action.
